follow_ups.title: Convert Qwen3 HTTP service startup into supervised runtime
follow_ups.reason: Real app smoke can use a foreground shell to keep the service alive, but production use needs health checks, restart policy, fallback behavior, and packaging decisions.

follow_ups.title: Record real Qwen3 app smoke evidence after user manual validation
follow_ups.reason: The agent can prepare the one-command runner and automated checks, but the product behavior must be verified in real macOS apps with Accessibility, Input Monitoring, Microphone, focus, and pasteboard permissions.

follow_ups.title: Close or supersede early cumulative Qwen3 App smoke contract
follow_ups.reason: The original smoke script and cumulative HTTP service path are no longer present; the validated active path is the later segmented-cache App smoke feature.
